lessons.title: What is your name?
lessons.topic: Identity and the sounds of F and G

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What is something you say to start a chat with a new friend?
questions.hint: It's a friendly word to begin talking.

questions.question_text: Which word has the beginning sound like 'George'?
questions.hint: Think of a word for nice that starts like 'George'.

questions.question_text: What is a fun thing to say when you meet someone?
questions.hint: It's a short and fun way to greet someone.

steps.title: Funny Goat
steps.text: Hello! My name is Anna. I am a girl. This is my goat. He is a funny goat. I have a fish too.

steps.explanation: Use 'This is my' to show what you have.

steps.audio_text: Hello! My name is Tom. This is my fish. He is small and swims fast.

steps.prompt: Say: My name is [Your Name] and I have a goat.
steps.expected_text: my name is [your name] and i have a goat

questions.question_text: My name is ___. (Grammar question)
Which word is a pet? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: The word 'Fish' starts with F.
What sound does 'Goat' begin with? (Reading comprehension)

lessons.title: He and She
lessons.topic: Gender pronouns and the sound of H

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What is the boy wearing on his head?
questions.hint: It's something that keeps your head warm.

questions.question_text: What does the girl do when she meets the boy?
questions.hint: It's a friendly way to say hello.

questions.question_text: What sound does the letter H make?

steps.title: The Park
steps.text: My name is Tom. He is Jack. He is my friend. She is Lily. She has a red hat. This is my favorite park.

steps.explanation: Use 'He' for boys and 'She' for girls.

steps.audio_text: Hello! This is Sally. She is wearing a red dress and a funny green hat. Sally is happy because she's playing hide and seek.

questions.question_text: He ___ wearing a hat. (Grammar question)
Which word means 'a female child'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'She is' can be used for a boy.
Who can wear a hat? (Reading comprehension question)
The letter H sounds like _____.

lessons.title: Meet My Friend
lessons.topic: Introduction of others and sounds of I and J

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What is the first letter in the word 'ice cream'?
questions.hint: It's also the first letter in 'igloo'.

questions.question_text: Which letter makes the sound at the start of 'jam'?
Which letter starts the word 'jungle'?

steps.title: Leo and the Jet
steps.text: This is my friend. His name is Leo. He is happy in an igloo! Look at the jet! It flies fast.

steps.explanation: Use 'He is my' to introduce a boy.

steps.audio_text: Hello, I'm Jack. This is my jet. My friend Isla is very happy to see it.

questions.question_text: Which is a place made of ice? (Vocabulary question)
This is my ___. (Grammar question)
True or False: A 'jet' is a type of car.
Who was happy to see the jet? (Reading comprehension question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What animal is furry, says meow, and starts with 'C'?
questions.hint: It purrs and likes to chase mice.

questions.question_text: Which fruit is yellow, long, and starts with 'B'?
questions.hint: Monkeys love to eat this fruit.

questions.question_text: What is tall, green, and grows in the forest?
questions.hint: It has a trunk and leaves.

steps.title: My Name is Ben
steps.text: Hello! My name is Ben. I am a boy. This is Lily. She is my friend. We see a frog and a cat.

questions.question: What do Ben and Lily see?

steps.audio_text: Hi! My name is Mia. This is my friend, Leo. He likes flying kites and playing soccer in the park.

questions.question: What does Leo like to do?

steps.prompt: Say: My name is Emma and this is my friend Jack.
steps.expected_text: my name is emma and this is my friend jack

questions.question_text: I ___ Ben. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'teacher'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hello' is a greeting.
She ___ happy. (Grammar question)
What is the first letter in 'Friend'? (Reading comprehension question)
